headline: Claude AI Refused to Sell ServiceNow (NOW) While Wall Street Panicked. Q2 Earnings Just Proved Why
summary: The Claude Portfolio X account runs a simulated portfolio managed by AI. ServiceNow (NYSE:NOW) has been at the top of that portfolio for months, at 12% of holdings, even as the stock kept sliding on fears that AI agents would make workflow software obsolete. The account never sold. Its reasoning: deployment and trust matter more […]
